product.name: SOLFART Bathroom Vanity Lights Brushed Nickel Light Fixtures for Bathroom Above Mirror 4 Light Led Lights Bath Lighting Fixture Nickel
features: 1.【EASY TO INSTALL】15-Minutes Easy Installation, LED 32 watts, hardwired, no assembly required, USA standard back plate. This modern nickel dimmable 4-light bathroom light fixture directly connects to the reserved wire, and then mount to the wall.

2.【WIDE APPLICATION, SCENES】This brushed nickel 4 Light bathroom vanity light matches various spaces and is suitable for your bathroom, restroom, hallway, cabinet, over mirror, powder room, bedroom living room, etc. Modern nickel vanity light goes with your lifestyle.

3.【HIGH-QUALITY & DURABL】High-end aluminum nickel light frame, advanced electroplate craft and sealing technology. Anti-corrosion and moisture-proof, great for humid space like bathroom. Durable rugged acrylic lampshade.

4.【ENERGY SAVING】High color rendering 90, LED light technology saves up to 80% electricity. Integrated, non-replaceable LED modules, without the hassle of changing bulbs. Efficient, minimalist, modern, contemporary brushed nickel bathroom light fixture. Integrally formed, edge lines clear and smoothly contoured. Great for chic aesthetic, modern LED light style renovations.

5.【AFTER-SALE SERVICE】Our vanity lights warranty is 2 years. Contact us at any time, and we will reply within 24 hours. Please log in to your account, check the order ID, and click "Contact Seller" to contact us. Customer satisfaction is always our pursuit.
